home.slogan: Nuxt.js Full-Stack SaaS Starter Kit - Free & Open Source

features.title: Solid Foundation for Your SaaS Success

modernTechStack.title: Modern Tech Stack
modernTechStack.description: Built with Nuxt, ready for Nuxt v4, TypeScript and Vue 3 Composition API

secureAuth.title: Secure Auth
secureAuth.description: A robust authentication system powered by Better Auth, providing OAuth2 social logins (Google, GitHub, etc.), sign-in/up, and email-based password reset capabilities.

enterpriseDatabase.title: Enterprise Database
enterpriseDatabase.description: PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM for type-safe operations

emailIntegration.title: Email Integration
emailIntegration.description: Built-in Resend integration for transactional emails

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: A powerful admin dashboard with beautiful charts

advancedTables.title: Advanced Tables
advancedTables.description: Notion/Airtable like advanced filtering, sorting, and pagination, and built-in generic list api out of the box

userSubscriptionManagement.title: User/Subscription Management
userSubscriptionManagement.description: Ready to use User/Subscription management page

modernUIDesign.title: Modern UI Design
modernUIDesign.description: Beautiful components with Nuxt UI and TailwindCSS

responsiveLayout.title: Responsive Layout
responsiveLayout.description: Optimized for all devices and screen sizes
